title: PPT Deck Extraction Completeness
automated_check: pptx_ingest.completeness_report() / deck_completeness(): deterministic per-deck metrics (slide count, interior empty slides, dropped-vs-source, body coverage). Cover + last-two slides are excluded (design/closing). Surfaced in sync (extraction_warnings), GET /api/extraction-check, and the offline eval. Verified all 9 real decks OK.
description: Every already-created session deck (Google Slides → pptx) must be fully ingested into the knowledge base: all slide titles, body text, tables and notes captured, so the agent understands the current flow of each past session.
criterion: For each ingested deck, extracted slide count and text coverage match the source deck; no slide silently dropped; tables and speaker notes captured.

rubric.5: All slides, body text, tables, and notes extracted; deck flow reconstructable.
rubric.3: All slides captured but some tables/notes thin.
rubric.1: Slides missing, or a deck failed to ingest and was skipped silently.

cases.rationale: Slide counts match; tables and notes present.
5 slides and all tables missing — extraction incomplete.
Deck failed to ingest and the failure was NOT surfaced — silent gap in course memory.
